title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Motors - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Motors - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
